LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RONAN ERICKSON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MR. RUBINSTEIN IS OBJECTING TO HAVING THE COURT HEAR ARGUMENT TODAY, AS HE ASSERTS THAT HE WAS IMPROPERLY NOTIFIED OF THE DEFENDANT'S INTENTION TO ARGUE. HEARING HELD AND ARGUED RE: NOTICE REQUIREMENT PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 8.3. THE COURT RULES THE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WAS NOT GIVEN PROPER NOTICE PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 8.3. AS TO THE MOTION, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED WHETHER DEFENDANT HAD THE ABILITY TO DISBURSE MONEY FROM CENTERSTONE'S ACCOUNT AND WHETHER DEFENDANT MISAPPROPRIATED THAT MONEY. SEE DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION PARAGRAPHS 8-11 AND DEFENDANT'S DEPOSITION PAGES 98-100. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.)
